final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input start,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (start) begin
            data_out <= data_in; // latch the input data
        end
    end
endmodule
